arts.ttl: Aaron Heard: Who is Bayer Leverkusen's USA U17 attacking midfielder?
arts.sum: Aaron Heard joins Bayer Leverkusen as a real prospect for the future, the 18-year-old arriving in Germany with a lot of hype after shining for Philly Union Academy and then St. Louis City SC. Heard began his promising youth career with Maryland club Bethesda-Olney SC before making the short move to the Philly Union Academy, where he became the club's top prospect, aged just 12.

arts.ttl: Haller rejoins Utrecht from Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: FC Utrecht has confirmed the signing of Sebastien Haller on loan from Borussia Dortmund. The striker has rejoined the Eredivisie side on a short-term loan move until the end of the season. Haller was on loan at the Spanish side Leganes for the first part of the season but that deal has been cancelled so […] The post Haller rejoins Utrecht from Borussia Dortmund appeared first on Football Oranje.
Speaking at his Thursday post-match presser, Bayer 04 Leverkusen trainer Xabi Alonso revealed that pivotal midfield talisman Granit Xhaka remained questionable for Friday's showdown with Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: BVB finalize Haller's Utrecht loan: "I'm coming home."
arts.sum: Dortmund striker Sebastien Haller's rumored loan-out to FC Utrecht is officially through.

arts.ttl: Report: How Borussia Dortmund reacted after learning Aston Villa's asking price for Jhon Duran
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund are the latest club to join the race for Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran having enquired about how much a deal would cost....

arts.ttl: Sebastian Kehl extends contract as Borussia Dortmund sporting director until 2027
arts.sum: Sebastian Kehl has extended his contract as sporting director at Borussia Dortmund until 2027. The club have officially confirmed the news this afternoon. The 44-year-old has come to an agreement…

arts.ttl: 'Contacts ongoing': Fabrizio Romano says Borussia Dortmund have now made approach to sign Man City teenager
BVB extend with Kehl: "Clear responsibilities and trust."
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have officially extended the contract of sporting director Sebastian Kehl. The 44-year-old will continue to work hand-in-hand with fellow execs Lars Ricken and Sven Mislintat

arts.ttl: Aston Villa ‘Make New Bid’ to Sign Donyell Malen
arts.sum: Aston Villa are in for a busy January transfer window and they have taken key steps to signing one new star to their ranks

arts.ttl: Preview: Borussia Dortmund vs Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: The Bundesliga returns this weekend after the winter break and begins with a big fixture between Borussia Dortmund and Bayer Leverkusen on Friday. Dortmund currently sit in sixth place with…
